title: nyc-commons — Money & Fiscal
description: Monetary amounts and the City fiscal calendar. Thirteen domains declare a private Money/MoneyUSD and several a FiscalYear/FiscalPeriod. NYC's fiscal year runs July 1 - June 30 and is named for the calendar year in which it ends (FY2026 = 2025-07-01 through 2026-06-30). Shared here so budget, contract, and payment amounts are comparable across agencies.

MoneyUSD.description: A monetary amount in US dollars. Modeled as a number to match Open Data extracts; treat as a decimal dollar value.

FiscalYear.description: NYC fiscal year, named for the calendar year in which it ends. FY2026 = 2025-07-01 through 2026-06-30.

FiscalPeriod.description: A fiscal reporting period within a City fiscal year.
